mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_CD as itemCd, ITEM_NM as itemNm, STOCK_QTY as stockQty, SAFE_QTY as safeQty FROM TB_ITEM WHERE STOCK_QTY <= SAFE_QTY AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT ORDER_NO as orderNo, ORDER_TYPE as orderType, DUE_DATE as dueDate, STATUS as status FROM TB_ORDER WHERE DUE_DATE < CURDATE() AND STATUS != 'DONE'
